definition: The directional lean for the current trading day, determined BEFORE the kill zones activate.
depends_on: IPDA (where price sits in macro range)
opening_gaps (NWOG position above/below CE is a primary daily bias input)
feeds_into: entry_models (only take trades aligned with daily bias)
power_of_three_and_AMD (bias tells you WHICH direction distribution will go)
related_to: CRT_candle_range_theory (previous daily candle's range predicts today's direction)
dealing_range (today's range expands from yesterday's levels)

determination_methods.HTF_structure: H4/D1 BOS or clear HH/HL (bullish) or LH/LL (bearish). Most reliable method.
determination_methods.previous_day_close: If price closed near PDH → bullish continuation expected. Near PDL → bearish. Near middle → unclear, reduce conviction.
determination_methods.IPDA_positioning: If price is in lower 25% of IPDA 40-day range → bullish bias (discount). Upper 25% → bearish bias (premium).
determination_methods.session_level_proximity: If PDL is close and unswept → expect sweep of PDL then rally (bullish). If PDH close and unswept → sweep PDH then sell (bearish).
determination_methods.CRT_method: Look at previous daily candle: if high was taken but low held → today likely targets low. If low taken but high held → today targets high.

bias_determination_checklist.run_before: 8:00 AM ET — complete this checklist before any kill zone activates

factors.bullish_signal: Higher highs + higher lows on H4 or D1
factors.bearish_signal: Lower highs + lower lows on H4 or D1

factors.bullish_signal: PDL unswept → expect manipulation toward PDL first, then rally
factors.bearish_signal: PDH unswept → expect manipulation toward PDH first, then sell-off

factors.bullish_signal: See seasonal_tendencies for bullish calendar patterns
factors.bearish_signal: See seasonal_tendencies for bearish calendar patterns

confidence_scoring.high: 4 or more factors align → 80%+ confidence. Use full position size.
confidence_scoring.moderate: Exactly 3 factors align → ~60% confidence. Use standard position size.
confidence_scoring.low: 2 or fewer factors align → ~40% confidence. Use half position or skip the session entirely.

bias_flip_rules: Do NOT flip bias during the session UNLESS: (1) A HTF CHoCH occurs on H4 or higher timeframe, AND (2) A displacement candle confirms the reversal direction, AND (3) You are not inside the manipulation window — a temporary move against bias mimics a reversal but is not one. All 3 conditions must be true before reconsidering bias.
when_bias_is_wrong: If the manipulation phase goes against your bias and HOLDS — meaning no reversal within 60 minutes — your bias was incorrect. Do NOT add to a losing thesis. Do NOT revenge trade. Close the position and wait for the next session with a fresh bias assessment.
bias_vs_manipulation: Bias tells you the DISTRIBUTION direction for the day. Manipulation ALWAYS moves against bias first to collect liquidity. If bias is bullish, expect a sweep of lows before the rally begins. This is not a bias failure — it is the expected manipulation phase. Hold bias through the sweep.

bridge_integration.grade_A: Requires bias alignment (signal direction matches daily bias). No exceptions.
bridge_integration.grade_B: Allows neutral bias (no clear directional lean from checklist). Proceed with reduced size.
bridge_integration.grade_C_D: Must NOT trade against a clear daily bias. If signal direction opposes bias, skip the setup regardless of other confluence.

key_rule: Establish bias ONCE before trading starts. Do NOT flip bias during the session. If manipulation goes against bias, it's the trap — hold the bias.
